# ToolsNowPro – llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/
# This file helps AI language models navigate and understand our site.

> ToolsNowPro is a collection of free browser-based utilities for creators, developers, and small businesses. All tools run client-side — no data is uploaded to servers. No account required. No expiry.

## Tools

- [QR Code Generator](https://toolsnowpro.com/qr-generator/): Generate static QR codes for URLs, WiFi credentials, vCards, email, SMS, and plain text. Outputs PNG and SVG. No signup, no watermark, codes never expire.
- [Text Case Converter](https://toolsnowpro.com/text-tools/): Convert text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and AlTeRnAtInG case. Live statistics included.
- [Word Counter](https://toolsnowpro.com/text-tools/word-counter.html): Count words, characters (with and without spaces), sentences, paragraphs and reading time. Supports word limit targets for SEO and social media.
- [Password Generator](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/password-generator.html): Generate cryptographically random passwords. Configurable length, symbols, uppercase, numbers. All generation happens client-side.
- [Image Converter](https://toolsnowpro.com/image-converter/): Convert images between JPG, PNG, and WebP formats. Resize and compress. Runs entirely in the browser — images never leave the user's device.
- [Username Generator](https://toolsnowpro.com/gaming/): Generate usernames for gaming, TikTok, Instagram, aesthetic, and business purposes. Client-side JavaScript generation.
- [JPG to PDF Converter](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/jpg-to-pdf.html): Convert JPG, PNG, and WebP images into PDFs in the browser for scans, receipts, menus, and screenshots.
- [Random Number Generator](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/random-number-generator.html): Roll dice, flip coins, pick a random number, and choose random names or colors.
- [Stopwatch / Timer](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/stopwatch-timer.html): Use preset countdown timers, stopwatch mode, Pomodoro sessions, and study or cooking timers.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/lorem-ipsum-generator.html): Generate placeholder text for mockups, wireframes, and layout previews.
- [Color Picker](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/color-picker.html): Pick colors and convert between HEX and RGB values.
- [JSON Formatter](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/json-formatter.html): Beautify and validate JSON payloads before debugging or sharing them.
- [Favicon Generator](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/favicon-generator.html): Turn a logo or icon into a browser-ready favicon.
- [Emoji Library](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/emoji-library.html): Browse and copy emojis from a dedicated browser-based library.
- [Cheat Sheet Library](https://toolsnowpro.com/tools/cheat-sheet-library.html): Find concise quick-reference cheat sheets for programming and productivity.
